_meta.generated: Hand-maintained. Keyed by signalsSummary field name (the LHS of satisfiedWhen predicates in rubric.json). Each entry pairs a signal with its source category and a one-line plain-English description for the /methodology/probes page.

outputStyle.description: Root string field; verbatim copy. Default, Explanatory, Learning, Concise, or custom.

effortLevel.description: Reasoning effort string. Default for Opus 4.7 is xhigh; max is per-session opt-in.

skipDangerous.description: True if the user has bypassed dangerous-action confirmation prompts globally.

allowListCount.description: Number of allowlist entries. Higher count = less friction from permission prompts.

hasWildcardAllow.description: True if at least one allowlist entry uses a wildcard.

autoCompactWindow.description: Truthy when the auto-compact context window override is set (deferring auto-compact past the 200k default).

autoMemoryEnabled.description: True unless the user has explicitly opted out of auto-memory. Default-on; inverse-flag semantics.

hasStopHook.description: True if at least one Stop hook is defined.

hasFormatterHook.description: True if a PostToolUse hook on Edit|Write runs a known formatter (prettier, ruff, gofmt, rustfmt, shfmt, or generic 'format' token).

hasStopHookNotification.description: True if a Stop hook fires a macOS/system notification when Claude finishes (terminal-notifier, osascript display notification, say, etc.).

hasCustomSpinnerVerbs.description: True if the user has defined custom spinner verbs (cosmetic personalization, Boris tip 4).

hasClaudeInChrome.description: True if the Claude in Chrome browser-automation integration is enabled.

hasRemoteControl.description: True if remote-control (spawn local sessions from mobile) is opted in.

mcpServersConnected.description: Number of currently-connected MCP servers (not just installed — actively connected at gather time).

claudeMdExists.description: True if project memory exists either at the project root or at the global user level.

personalSkillNames.description: Array of personal skill directory names that pass the substantiveness check (skill body references run/use/prefer, not just a stub).

hasShipCommand.description: True if a /ship command exists in personal or project command library.

hasVerifyAgent.description: True if a verification-flavored agent exists. Matches: filename ^verify, body tokens like 'verify' or 'code-reviewer', plugin name pr-review-toolkit.

hasIsolatedAgent.description: True if any agent declares isolation: worktree in its frontmatter.

hasCodeReviewPlugin.description: True if the code-review plugin is enabled. Anchored regex rejects pr-review-toolkit, code-review-helper, pre-code-review.

hasSlackPlugin.description: True if a Slack-flavored plugin is enabled (case-insensitive substring).

hasVercelCli.description: True if the Vercel CLI binary is on PATH. External tool detection — not from .claude/.

parallelWorktreeAdoption.path: Derived OR of three signals (PR #50 v1.3 broadening)
parallelWorktreeAdoption.description: True if any of: 3+ za/zb/zc-style aliases, 3+ worktree shell shortcuts, or 3+ parallel-worktree sessions in the lookback window.

planThenLaunchSessions.description: Count of sessions where the first assistant turn after ExitPlanMode is a tool_use call (Boris tip 65: delegation over guidance).

shipVerifyStageRecent.description: Count of recent /ship runs that reached the verify-agent stage.

goCommandUses.description: Count of /go invocations (verify reflex). MAX-merged across history.jsonl and transcripts since /go can be invoked from either surface.

batchCommandUses.description: Count of /batch invocations. Parallel-worktree sweep, Boris tip 30.

btwCommandUses.description: Count of /btw side-chain question invocations. Boris tip 33.

voiceCommandUses.description: Count of /voice invocations. Boris tip 60 (typed counterpart to mic mode).

clearCommandUses.description: Count of /clear invocations. Resets context aggressively (vs /compact which preserves).

focusCommandUses.description: Count of /focus invocations. Locks Claude into a specified directory subtree.

scheduleCommandUses.description: Count of /schedule invocations. Cloud-hosted recurring jobs that run laptop-closed.

loopCommandUses.description: Count of /loop invocations (any kind). Local autonomous loops up to 3 days.

rewindCommandUses.description: Count of /rewind invocations. Backtracks to a prior conversational state. Boris tip 62.

simplifyCommandUses.description: Count of /simplify invocations. Parallel-agent code-quality sweep, Boris tip 41.

fewerPermsCommandUses.description: Count of /fewer-permission-prompts invocations. Analyzes recent tool calls and proposes allowlist additions.
